stories.title: Desi Remedies Ka Hidden Power
stories.description: 3 powerful natural remedies jo body ko silently heal karte hain — with real stats, real effects, aur shocking facts jo tujhe aaj tak nahi pata the.

modules.video_generation_prompt: ACTION: stomps left leg at 0s, throws powder burst at 2s, jabs finger at lens at 4s, leans forward hard at 6s, shakes body at 8s, freeze scream at 9s REACTION: cough-like burst at 5s, eyes flare at 7s, stomps both legs at 9s, mouth stretches maximum at end MOVEMENT STYLE: aggressive stomp CAMERA: smash push-in wide to extreme close SPEAKING TONE: solution-driven urgent screamer DIALOGUE: मैं Haldi hoon, chutiya sirf colour nahi! Curcumin 500mg रोज लेने से inflammation markers CRP 32% तक घटते हैं 8 हफ्तों में. Science hai, dadi ka myth nahi samjha?
modules.image_generation_prompt: Haldi powder character stands wide-legged on a rustic Indian kitchen wooden shelf scattered with turmeric dust and मसाला particles. Surface shows rough grainy powder-dusted texture with deep yellow earthy tones and uneven clumps. Behind, clay pots, steel containers, and warm orange glowing kitchen light create a busy desi environment. Eyes deeply scrunched with thick cartoon brows burning rage, whites visible. Tiny round button nose wrinkled. Right hand jabbing finger toward camera lens, left hand raised mid-gesture. Two short stubby legs wide apart, feet angled outward. Full body leaning forward fifteen degrees, mouth wide open screaming, back teeth and uvula visible. Cinematic rim light from behind, warm golden key light from forty five degrees, deep shadows under chin and legs, lens flare bursting from eyes. Fine turmeric particles floating in air.
